title: Baseconnect web preview can log in with the staging bot
description: Starts or reuses the local Expo web preview on the worker, drives the real /login-app flow with the worker-local staging bot auth file, and verifies the app lands on an authenticated Baseconnect surface.
command:
set -euo pipefail
source "{{authEnvPath}}"
export PATH="/home/ec2-user/node-v22.15.0-linux-x64/bin:/home/ec2-user/.local-agent-browser/bin:$PATH"
PORT="{{previewPort}}"
SESSION="{{sessionName}}"
APP_DIR="{{targetPath}}/apps/expo-app"
LOG_FILE="/tmp/baseconnect-health-web.log"
wait_for_port() {
  python3 - "$1" <<'PY'
import socket, sys, time
port = int(sys.argv[1])
for _ in range(120):
    s = socket.socket()
    s.settimeout(1)
    ok = s.connect_ex(("127.0.0.1", port)) == 0
    s.close()
    if ok:
        raise SystemExit(0)
    time.sleep(1)
raise SystemExit(1)
PY
}
if ! ss -ltn '( sport = :'"$PORT"' )' | tail -n +2 | grep -q .; then
  cd "$APP_DIR"
  nohup npx expo start --web --port "$PORT" --clear >"$LOG_FILE" 2>&1 &
  wait_for_port "$PORT"
fi
agent-browser close --session "$SESSION" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
agent-browser open "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/login-app" --session "$SESSION" >/dev/null
agent-browser wait --session "$SESSION" --fn 'document.readyState === "complete"' >/dev/null
EMAIL_JSON=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os
print(json.dumps(os.environ['BASECONNECT_EMAIL']))
PY
)
PASSWORD_JSON=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os
print(json.dumps(os.environ['BASECONNECT_PASSWORD']))
PY
)
LOGIN_RESULT=$(agent-browser eval --session "$SESSION" "(async()=>{const text=()=>document.body.innerText||''; const getState=()=>({href:location.href,text:text().slice(0,1600)}); if(text().includes('BOT, SKYNET-00')) return JSON.stringify({...getState(),stage:'already'}); const inputs=[...document.querySelectorAll('input')]; const emailInput=inputs.find(el=>/username|email/i.test(el.placeholder||''))||inputs[0]; const passwordInput=inputs.find(el=>/password/i.test(el.placeholder||'')||el.type==='password')||inputs[1]; const setValue=(el,value)=>{const setter=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(Object.getPrototypeOf(el),'value')?.set; if(setter) setter.call(el,value); else el.value=value; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}; if(emailInput&&passwordInput){setValue(emailInput, ${EMAIL_JSON}); setValue(passwordInput, ${PASSWORD_JSON});} await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300)); const checkbox=[...document.querySelectorAll('div[tabindex=\"0\"]')].find(el=>{const t=(el.textContent||'').trim(); return t==='' || t==='';}); if(checkbox && (checkbox.textContent||'').trim()==='') checkbox.click(); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300)); const label=[...document.querySelectorAll('div')].find(el=>(el.textContent||'').trim()==='󰍂Login'); if(!label) return JSON.stringify({...getState(),stage:'no-submit-label'}); const r=label.getBoundingClientRect(); const x=r.left+r.width/2; const y=r.top+r.height/2; const hit=document.elementFromPoint(x,y); if(!hit) return JSON.stringify({...getState(),stage:'no-submit-hit'}); hit.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,clientX:x,clientY:y})); for(let i=0;i<16;i++){ await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1000)); if((document.body.innerText||'').includes('BOT, SKYNET-00')) return JSON.stringify({...getState(),stage:'authed'}); } return JSON.stringify({...getState(),stage:'timeout'});})()")
printf '%s' "$LOGIN_RESULT" | grep -q 'BOT, SKYNET-00'
